learning_outcomes: Implement core concepts of Site Reliability; Design scalable solutions; Build production-ready applications; Optimize performance using industry tools.

skills_covered: CI/CD Pipelines, Containerization, Cloud Deployment, Monitoring & Logging
subtopics: Architecture Design, Scalability Patterns, Production Deployment, Optimization Strategies
tools_used: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, Git, Prometheus
